title: Please allow me to see my viewing history
excerpt:
Hello, 
I would like the ability to view my history within Monday.com in the same way I can view my browsing history. This may sound redundant, but I was looking at a board yesterday and I can’t find it today. I’ve tried…

posts.author: PiperWilson (Piper Wilson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I would like the ability to view my history within Monday.com in the same way I can view my browsing history. This may sound redundant, but I was looking at a board yesterday and I can’t find it today. I’ve tried my regular browsing history and haven’t had any luck.
